Badger Grapple Red — Fire Polish v3 Asset Manifest

Replaced presentation assets as exact drop-in PNGs in assets/ and dist/assets/. No gameplay/source contracts changed.

assets/tiles/fieldhouse_tiles.png -> 256x64 -> 32x32 grid, 8x2 -> frames 0 floor, 1 wall, 2 grass/scout, 3 red mat, 4 recovery, 5 shop, 6 podium, 7 NPC marker, 8 warp door, 9 water, 10 tree, 11 bleachers, 12 banner wall, 13 path, 14 fence, 15 sign.
assets/sprites/player_walk.png -> 96x192 -> 32x48 grid, 3x4 -> rebuilt coach protagonist walk cycle, DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT/UP rows.
assets/sprites/npc_walk.png -> 96x192 -> 32x48 grid, 3x4 -> rebuilt bright trainer/student walk cycle, tint-friendly.
assets/sprites/battle_badger.png -> 96x96 -> single -> compact badger-motif neutral starter front.
assets/sprites/battle_badger_back.png -> 96x96 -> single -> compact badger-motif neutral starter back.
assets/sprites/battle_neutral.png -> 96x96 -> single -> staggered leg-attack archetype front.
assets/sprites/battle_neutral_back.png -> 96x96 -> single -> staggered leg-attack archetype back.
assets/sprites/battle_top.png -> 96x96 -> single -> heavy top-control archetype front.
assets/sprites/battle_top_back.png -> 96x96 -> single -> heavy top-control archetype back.
assets/sprites/battle_scramble.png -> 96x96 -> single -> lanky scramble archetype front.
assets/sprites/battle_scramble_back.png -> 96x96 -> single -> lanky scramble archetype back.
assets/sprites/battle_pace.png -> 96x96 -> single -> lean forward-pressure archetype front.
assets/sprites/battle_pace_back.png -> 96x96 -> single -> lean forward-pressure archetype back.
assets/ui/logo.png -> 256x128 -> single -> original pixel wordmark, cardinal/cream/gold.
assets/ui/fieldhouse_scene.png -> 896x448 -> single -> full overworld backdrop rebuilt from new visual language because current engine renders this image, not tile sprites.
assets/ui/battle_arena.png -> 480x432 -> single -> polished battle mat/gym backdrop.
assets/ui/title_bg.png -> 480x432 -> single -> optional title keyart backdrop for future wiring.
assets/portraits/*.png -> 96x96 -> single -> upgraded archetype portraits already loaded by BootScene.

Optional tileFrames proposal: {'~':9, 'Y':10, 'B':11, 'b':12, ',':13, 'f':14, 'i':15}
